description: Evidence-backed as-of replay showing gradual KYC drift from enterprise BI software toward a leveraged Bitcoin treasury strategy.
reference_model: Enterprise Business Intelligence software and cloud analytics.
alarm_title: MicroStrategy adopts Bitcoin as primary treasury reserve asset with a $250M purchase

events.title: MicroStrategy announces capital allocation strategy: buyback plus alternative assets including digital assets such as bitcoin
events.evidence: Company says it may invest up to $250M in alternative assets including digital assets such as bitcoin.
events.extracted_fact: MicroStrategy anunció una estrategia de asignación de capital que incluye compras de acciones y activos alternativos, entre ellos activos digitales como el bitcoin

events.title: MicroStrategy adopts Bitcoin as primary treasury reserve asset with a $250M purchase
events.evidence: Company purchases 21,454 bitcoins and states Bitcoin is now the principal holding in treasury reserve strategy.
events.extracted_fact: MicroStrategy adquiere Bitcoin como activo principal de reserva de tesorería con un monto de $250M

decision.triggering_event: MicroStrategy adopts Bitcoin as primary treasury reserve asset with a $250M purchase
